projectDescription: Katalo is a server-to-server API for generating AI-staged real estate imagery — submit a source image, create a generation job, and receive signed output URLs via webhook or polling.
keyFeatures: AI virtual staging for real estate images (photo, panorama360, floorplan)
Two-step source asset ingest with deduplication and reuse
Asynchronous job delivery via signed webhooks or polling
Per-job regeneration from the same source asset
Organization-scoped API keys with rotation and revocation
Usage summary and billing ledger endpoints for reconciliation
Idempotency key support on all write endpoints
